fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → verify ANALYTICS_API_KEY and ANALYTICS_API_SECRET
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Verify SEO update scripts and check for any syntax errors in the code → review SEO update logs for more information
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Check video review script for any errors and verify that video review data is being sent to the correct endpoint → review Video Reviewer logs for more information
